title: The Rebellion Begins
description: Pages 16–18 focus on the rebellion begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Palace four- Dations - the House of Toys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's nowhere left to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Give it up and come quietly!! Franky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I've made my decision...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...To keep causing pointless chaos here!!! So let's get fighting!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ewwh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If I let these people chase me down into the under- ground...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...I'll just be causing more trouble for the dwarfs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The SOP operation is up to you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bring it on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: AAAGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll handle things here!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We're counting on you, usoland!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the heck happened here?!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Intruders, apparently, but seeing as they're up against TreBol- Sama...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I almost feel sorry for them. They're as good as dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I was care- less!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Now!! Put the grape into her mouth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Aaah!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Even I've been turned into a toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Everyone must have forgotten that I exist ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: USOP!! Where's USOP?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: We're counting on you, usopp... you're the only chance we have left!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You have to turn us all back into humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: behe- hehehe- heh!!!!!!!!!!!!! Heh!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: How many times are these idiots gonna try attacking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: They kept trying to put this into my mouth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It must be poison.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: It smells awful.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: usoland... our strength was not enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Fear not!! If things go wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I will always be here to save you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Out of my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Hm? Where are you going, friend?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Escape success- Full!! Forgive me, little tontatta....!! I know what I'll do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I'll write a picture book recording your brave acts and pass it on to future genera- Tions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Don't run, USOP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: "The honest Tontatta"! A good title!! So you see, I have to live!! Besides, this is all frankly's fault really!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Why isn't he showing up?! I'm not going to get myself killed over some lie that I'm a hero!! Dam- mitall!!!

summary: The Rebellion Begins focuses on Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.
